name: Primrows
short_description: A challenging game of logic, luck, and pattern recognition that adds a twist of chance to sudoku mechanics. Tend to a whimsical garden with organic sounds and visuals while you unearth new weekly challenges that introduce special mechanics.
detailed_description:
Cultivate Your Garden And Mind

Tend to a garden that tickles your brain and satisfies your senses with tactile, organic sounds and animations.

Test your skills in a game of logic, luck, and pattern recognition. After flowers grow at random, prune them away to ensure there are no two of the same flower in any row, column, or quadrant. Harvest at the end of each round to collect points and grow your high score.  Master new challenges presented in each round as you watch your gardens flourish!

Keep your mind sharp with a game that can fill the gaps in your day.  With no time pressure, you’re free to grow your gardens with care at a comfortable pace.  Primrows offers endless replayability and new variety each week — perfect for players looking for a new daily routine.

Fresh Ways to Play And Weekly Challenges

Harvest as many points as you can in Quick Play or enjoy the more advanced Journal Play that rewards you for meeting certain criteria.

Can’t get enough? Anticipate each Weekly Challenge that introduces special flowers and tiles that change the gameplay. Celebrate holidays and other milestones with themed challenges and festive artwork to get you in the spirit of the season.

Lose Yourself In Thought (And Nature)

Primrows combines elements from sudoku and board games into an approachable and novel puzzle challenge that invites you to play at your own pace.  With a high skill ceiling and plenty of depth, gameplay offers a challenging and versatile experience.

Immerse yourself in ambient music and hand-painted backgrounds that change with each season. Primrows features award-winning visuals that invite you to settle in and strategize.

  • Scratch that puzzle itch with Quick Play or enjoy deep strategy with Journal Play

  • Weekly challenges to expand your gardening expertise

  • Balance strategy, chance, and pattern recognition with no time pressure

  • Immersive ambient soundscape inspired by nature

  • Cheerful artwork that changes with the seasons

  • Infinitely replayable with a high skill ceiling

  • Digestible for players of all skill levels

  • Accessibility for color blindness and low vision
